hero.title:
The CRM that keeps
every wash bay running.
hero.subtitle: Full-stack car wash management — bookings, workforce, payments, and analytics — in one platform built for operators who want control.

features.label: Features
features.title:
Everything an operator needs.
Nothing they don't.
features.subtitle: From scheduling to subscription billing — WashFlow covers the full operational stack.

multiLocation.title: Multi-Location Management
multiLocation.desc: Manage all branches from a single dashboard. Each location has its own schedule, staff, and work posts — fully independent.

scheduling.title: Conflict-Free Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Visual schedule grid with 30-minute slots. Click any free slot to open the order wizard. No double-bookings, guaranteed.

workforce.title: Workforce Capacity Engine
workforce.desc: Available slots factor in both free bays and workers on shift. Understaffed? The system hides unavailable slots automatically.

realtime.title: Real-Time Operations
realtime.desc: Every order update broadcasts instantly to all connected screens. Front desk, managers, and mobile — everyone sees the same truth.

booking.title: Public Booking Widget
booking.desc: Give customers a branded booking page with your services, available time slots, and branch selector. Embed it on your website.

billing.title: Subscription Billing
billing.desc: Four pricing tiers with per-resource add-ons. Upgrade and downgrade without disrupting your operations.

analytics.title: Analytics & CSV Export
analytics.desc: Revenue trends, branch comparisons, employee performance, and anomaly alerts. Export orders and clients to CSV in one click.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.desc: 47 granular permissions across 14 modules. Each team member sees only what they need. Create custom roles for any position.

audit.title: Full Audit Trail
audit.desc: Every action is logged — who changed what and when. Resolve disputes with confidence and stay compliant.

schedule.label: Schedule view
schedule.title:
Every bay, every hour —
at a glance.
schedule.desc: The schedule grid shows all work posts as rows and 30-minute slots as columns. Click any free slot and a pre-filled order wizard opens instantly.
schedule.bullet1: Rows locked during booking — zero double-bookings
schedule.bullet2: Workforce cap applied — slot hidden when all workers are busy
schedule.bullet3: Pre-filled order wizard opens from any free slot

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.title:
Numbers that tell you
where to act.
analytics.desc: Branch comparisons, employee performance, service popularity, booking source breakdown, and automated anomaly alerts — all in one screen.
analytics.bullet1: Anomaly alerts fire automatically when cancel rate or revenue deviates from your rolling average
analytics.bullet2: Per-employee report: orders, revenue, cancel rate — filterable by branch & date range
analytics.bullet3: One-click CSV export of all orders and clients — no waiting, no email queue

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title:
From setup to
first booking in minutes.

register.title: Register your car wash
register.desc: One form creates your account and a 30-day trial with full access — no credit card required.

branches.title: Configure branches & bays
branches.desc: Add branches, define work posts, set working hours and booking buffers per location.

team.title: Set up your team
team.desc: Invite staff, assign roles with granular permissions, and create workforce profiles with shift hours.

goLive.title: Go live — online & walk-in
goLive.desc: Embed the public booking widget on your website. Accept walk-ins from the dashboard. Everything syncs in real time.

realtime.label: Real-time
realtime.title:
Every event, live —
across every screen.
realtime.desc: Order events flow from your operations to every connected device. Staff at the front desk and managers watching the dashboard see the same truth.
realtime.bullet1: Secure WebSocket connection — auto-join your workspace
realtime.bullet3: Background jobs — emails, analytics, booking confirmations

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Start free. Scale as you grow.
pricing.subtitle: 30-day trial on every account. Annual billing saves 2 months. Add-ons available on Starter & Business.
pricing.note: All plans include a 30-day free trial · No credit card required · Annual billing: 2 months free

cta.label: Get started today
cta.title:
Your first booking
in under 5 minutes.
cta.subtitle: No setup fees. No credit card. Cancel any time. Just create an account and your 30-day trial starts immediately.
cta.note: 30 days free · All features included · No credit card
